header.description: Spitfire Mk V flies a banked climbing spiral via a multi-phase schedule: roll in to 45 deg, then add an 8 m/s climb. Exercises bank and climb commands simultaneously. TAS 120 m/s sits in the spitfire_mk5 LUT domain (phi_max=53 deg, climb_max=12 m/s); start alt 3000 m stays clear of the ceiling.
